exercises.title: The Great Split
exercises.prompt: Euler's formula: feed a rotation into the tower and it splits into cosine and sine.

exercises.title: Summoning the Circle
exercises.prompt: Multiply the split by its conjugate in an align* block — and a circle appears.

exercises.title: The Sleeping Power Rule
exercises.prompt: With sine and cosine now defined by series, their derivatives are just the power rule.
